Cedar Hill Fire Department · Response Performance

Performance Metrics

Response and readiness metrics by shift and station. Updates as new reports are posted.

CHFD Performance Board v1.6 Turnout data — • viewed —
Cedar Hill Fire · Response Performance Standards

Turnout Times by Shift

Turnout time — dispatch to enroute — for each front-line unit, split by A / B / C shift. Shift is assigned from the 48/96 schedule (A = Jan 1–2, B = Jan 3–4, C = Jan 5–6, repeating). Switch the window between the last 7 days, last 30 days, and year to date.

Window Past 7 days Past 30 days Year to date
Measure Average 90th percentile
Guide NFPA 1710 line
Turnout time by unit & shift —
A shift B shift C shift
Data
▶ Data table & call counts
UnitShiftCallsAverage90th pct
Cedar Hill Fire · Training

Training Hours by Shift

Total training hours completed, credited to each station and split by A / B / C shift. Shift is taken from the training date (48/96 rotation); admin and unassigned personnel are excluded.

Window Past 7 days Past 30 days Year to date
Training hours by station & shift —
A shift B shift C shift
